name: Safe synthetic playbook: New admin account created outside policy
description: Directory alert for a net-new administrator principal that lacks required approval metadata in the lab IdP. Focuses on provisioning workflow integrity—no password material, no impersonation guidance.

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: HRIS feed stub shows new user lab-admin-shadow-33 with admin group membership.
Provisioning validator notes missing CAB reference field for admin elevation.
Identity team simulation debates temporary disable versus evidence collection-first.

payload.title: LAB: Admin account lacking governance metadata (synthetic)

events_emitted.headline: Privileged account creation alert
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Highlights break in joiner/mover/leaver controls for admin tier.

events_emitted.headline: Governance finding
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Maps to change management expectations in lab control library.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Unauthorized-by-policy admin creation may indicate insider or compromised provisioning.
Change management and access certification policies apply.

expected_remediation.summary: Disable account pending validation, reconcile with HRIS, restore least-privilege template, open provisioning root-cause review.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Flag account for step-up review in IdP sandbox (no production lock without approval).

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: False positives could lock out valid emergency administrators.

expected_final_report.title: Admin account outside policy — synthetic playbook outcome
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: A new admin lacked required approval metadata; playbook centers on safe containment and process repair, not account takeover.
